case_number: Civil judge in Civil Suit No.25/2018

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Muhammad Abdul Rehman. C.P.No.D-3253 of 2025 Ghulam Rasool............. Petitioner Vs. Director General, SBCA & others............... Respondents. 1. For orders on MA 14047/2025. 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on MA 14048/2025. 4. For hearing of main case 05.08.2025. Petitioner in person. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Petitioner has challenged a judgment dated 26.04.2025 passed by learned Senior Civil judge in Civil Suit No.25/2018, whereby she has returned the plaint U/o VII rule 10 CPC to be filed before proper forum. Petitioner despite insistence has failed to satisfy the court regarding maintainability of this petition against the impugned judgment. When we posed him a question as to why he has not challenged the said judgment in Revision Application as required under the law, he submits that such order may be passed by this court. We fail to understand that when a remedy is available to the petitioner under the statute, why he needs such order. Therefore, we do not find this petition maintainable and accordingly dismiss it in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
